channel.title: Category and tags for post single and list item please
channel.description:
Hi team,
As I am following tutorial in frontity I cannot find the way on how to display category and tags on list-item.js and post.js.
Any clue would be appreciated. Thanx

item.title: Category and tags for post single and list item please
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Hi @futur3int

If I understand your question correctly I think you will need to use a handler. Here’s a couple of examples which might help you:

How to list posts of categories and its sub categories? 🤗 Dev Talk & Questions
Yeah, I think so. You can fetch posts from multiple categories at once using comma separated ids: ?categories=1,2,3. It’d be something like this: const myCategoriesHandler = { pattern: "/category/(.*)?/:slug", func: async ({ route, params, state, libraries }) => { // Get the page of the current route. const { page } = libraries.source.parse(route); // Get the id of the parent category. const parentCatResponse = await libraries.source.api.get({ endpoint: "categories…

List all categories as links 🤗 Dev Talk & Questions
Hey guys, sorry for the lack of documentation on this aspect, we’ll work on improving it. We try to explain what State is and how Frontity works at this page of the documentation. State is an object where Frontity exposes all the data needed for the packages. By default, Frontity fetch the common data from WordPress and populate the state.source. This way, you can find all the info about categories, posts, tags, authors, etc. At state.source.data you can access this data using the URL, which ma…

Hope this helps. Let us know how you get on with this.

Read full topic
item.source: Category and tags for post single and list item please

item.title: Category and tags for post single and list item please
item.dc:creator: futur3int
item.description:
Hi,

Thanx for your reply. I am very new to react. Im going slowly. Im trying to get some hints on how to display terms from a custom taxonomy on the list-item.js page. My custom tax is defined in the rest api, i can see it and i can call with item.mycustomtax the terms id related to the post. Now I guess theres a simple way to retrieve and display terms names from those ids. A tiny help would be awesome. TY

Read full topic
item.source: Category and tags for post single and list item please

item.title: Category and tags for post single and list item please
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Hi @futur3int

Welcome to the community forum. We’re delighted that you’re interested in Frontity.

Awesome that you figured out your problem. Sounds like you’re doing great.

By the way, we’d love to know what you’re planning to build with Frontity.

Read full topic
